timestamp.description: Precise date and time of the video upload.

video_id.description: Unique identifier for each YouTube video.

category.description: Broad content category such as Music, Gaming, or Education.

language.description: Primary language of the video content.

region.description: Two-letter country code representing the target region.

duration_sec.description: Total length of the video in seconds.

views.description: Total number of views received by the video.

likes.description: Total number of likes on the video.

comments.description: Total number of comments on the video.

shares.description: Total number of times the video was shared.

sentiment_score.description: Average audience sentiment ranging from -1.0 (unhappy) to 1.0 (very happy).

ads_enabled.description: Binary flag indicating if ads are enabled (1) or not (0).

upload_month.description: Year and month of upload in YYYY-MM format, useful for monthly trends.

upload_year.description: The calendar year the video was uploaded.

day_of_week.description: The full name of the day the video was uploaded (e.g., Monday).

region_name.description: Full name of the country or region for better readability.

duration_min.description: Total length of the video in minutes, rounded to one decimal place.
